## Description

A clear description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor (code change with no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (typecheck + lint + audit + build)
- [ ] New code follows the existing architecture and naming conventions
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data added to tracked files
- [ ] UI state changes use `useUiPreferencesStore` (not raw `localStorage`)
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in this PR description
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for new features or bug fixes)

## Related Issues

Closes #
